blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 970 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: overcast, highs of 44°F, gusts to 41 mph.

Thursday: overcast, highs of 57°F, gusts to 68 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
